summary: Comprehensive testing of Interest Rate Override feature (inline rate input on Receive Payments page). All 9 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests PASSED via Playwright. Feature allows setting interest rate inline when generating interest charges, with option to save rate to customer profile.

verified_working: Interest Rate input field visible in charges section (data-testid='interest-rate-input')
For customer WITH saved rate: input pre-fills with saved rate value (tested: Credit Customer 264ebc6f shows '3')
For customer WITHOUT saved rate: input is empty (tested: TEST_AUTOMATION_CUSTOMER_2026 shows '')
Typing a rate updates the interest preview in real-time via debounced API call (400ms)
'Save X%/mo to this customer's profile' checkbox appears when entered rate differs from saved rate (data-testid='save-rate-checkbox')
Save checkbox hidden when rate matches customer's saved rate
Generate Interest button is disabled when rate input is empty/0
Generate Interest button is enabled when rate > 0
Formula explanation text shown: 'principal × (rate ÷ 30) × days since last computation'
Grace period displayed: '7 days' shown correctly

backend.test_01_get_customers_list: PASS - Found customers with/without saved rates
backend.test_05_generate_interest_with_rate_over: PASS - Created interest invoice INT-MB-001000 with rate_override=4.0
backend.test_06_generate_interest_with_rate_over: PASS - Rate saved to customer profile when save_rate=true
backend.test_07_generate_interest_no_rate_return: PASS - Returns helpful message when no rate provided
backend.test_08_get_customer_invoices: PASS - Endpoint returns open invoices correctly

critical_code_review_comments: PaymentsPage.js line 65-67: interestRateInput state and interestPreviewTimer ref properly implemented
PaymentsPage.js lines 136-145: Debounced preview update (400ms) correctly uses useEffect with cleanup
PaymentsPage.js lines 184-206: handleGenerateInterest properly sends rate_override and save_rate in payload
accounting.py lines 1410-1421: Backend correctly handles rate_override and save_rate parameters
accounting.py lines 1673-1723: charges-preview endpoint accepts rate_override query param
seed_data_creation: None - used existing TEST_AUTOMATION_CUSTOMER_2026 and Credit Customer 264ebc6f
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interest rate override feature fully tested. TEST_AUTOMATION_CUSTOMER_2026 now has an interest invoice INT-MB-001000 (₱115.60). Credit Customer 264ebc6f has saved rate 3%/mo. Rate override endpoints: GET /customers/{id}/charges-preview?rate_override=X and POST /customers/{id}/generate-interest with {rate_override, save_rate} body.
